response.step_by_step_log: I identified two songs in the video based on the on-screen text. For 'Star Star Start', I searched for 'スタースタート lyrics' which identified Tokino Sora as the artist. For 'Lyrical Monster', I searched for 'リリカルMonster lyrics' which identified Shirogane Noel as the artist. I used standard bilingual lyric sources to extract the original Japanese and English translations. The performers in the video were identified as Ichijou Ririka and her guests based on the festival context.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed at the Ichijou Ririka Birthday Festival 2025. The first song is 'Star Star Start' and the second is 'Lyrical Monster'.

scenes.description: Ichijou Ririka and guest perform 'Star Star Start'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: (フッフー!) (フーワッフーワッ!) (フッフー!) (フーワッフーワッ!) 我らの宇宙のはじまりは (パパヤ!) ただの愛だ! 超超カオス! でもこの銀河じゃ、あ・な・た・と! (ヘイ!) あぁ、スタースタースタートしたこのラブは あなたがいなきゃいまごろ超新星! ぜったいぜったいちょっと距離が近い! さあスタースタースタートで、スターになっちゃう! 超超ファスト! (ヘイ!) そしてキラめかして、宇宙のキラめき! あ・な・た・と! (ヘイ!)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (Fuffu!) (Fu-wafuwawa!) (Fuffu!) (Fu-wafuwawa!) The beginning of our universe (Papaya!) Is just love! It's super super chaotic! But in this galaxy, it's just you and me! (Hey!) Ah, this love that started as a star star, If you weren't there, by now it would be a supernova! I'm definitely, definitely a little bit too close to you! Let's go super super star, and become a star! It's super super fast! (Hey!) And let's make it sparkle, the universe's sparkle! It's just you and me! (Hey!)

scenes.description: Ichijou Ririka and Shirogane Noel perform 'Lyrical Monster'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: Ring-dong, ring-dong 鼓動が Beat it 期待も Heat up 感じて Joy-joy! もっとハッピー! ドタドタ! Jumping Jumping ディスプレイをJamming 異論反論は認めません 史上最高の団長だから ますますLoving？ 一緒にSinging リリカルなStar！ Amazing！リリカルMonster！ Supreme！ Yeaaah Ring-Dong, Ring-Dong!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Ring-dong, ring-dong, the heartbeat is beating it, expecting it, heating up, feeling it! Joy-joy! More happiness, dot-a-dot-a! Jumping jumping, jamming the display! I won't accept objections, I'm the best commander in history! More and more loving? Singing together, Lyrical Star! Amazing! Lyrical Monster! Supreme! Yeaaah! Ring-dong, ring-dong!
